feed.title: SAP Community - ABAP Development
feed.subtitle: ABAP Development Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: How to get the cancellation date for an invoice in VBRK?
entry.content:
Hi all,

How can I get the cancellation date when an invoice in VBRK is cancelled (FKSTO='X')?

TIA,

Luis Rodriguez

entry.title: How can I configure the Z field added to the BUT000 table via web ui in the CRM system to the BP.
entry.content: How can I configure the Z field added to the BUT000 table via web ui in the CRM system to the BP screen?

entry.title: SAP GTS Version retrieve
entry.content:
Hi,

Good Day.

We are using the latest version of SAP GTS with the EHP8 upgrade, but by mistake, some transports from the development environment, which were created before the EHP8 version, were imported into the quality environment. As a result, these transports have overwritten the EHP8 version when checking the version management of certain objects. Is there a way to restore the EHP8 version as the active version again?

entry.title: CL_BCS Creates folder in client's outlook for PDF print.
entry.content:
I am using CL_BCS to send an attachment of Smartform output print which is nothing but a PDF file, however this attachment creates extra folder in Outlook, which requires one extra click to open PDF file.

Is there any solution to send an attachment without this extra folder?       

 

 

Actual PDF after clicking the folder.

 

 

 

      CALL FUNCTION 'CONVERT_OTF'
       EXPORTING
         FORMAT                      = 'PDF'
       IMPORTING
         BIN_FILESIZE                = W_BINFILESIZE
         bin_file                    = lv_bin_xstr
        TABLES
          OTF                        =  IT_OTF_DATA
          LINES                      =  IT_PDF_DATA
                .
      IF SY-SUBRC <> 0.
      ELSE.
       CALL FUNCTION 'SCMS_XSTRING_TO_BINARY'
         EXPORTING
           buffer     = lv_bin_xstr
         TABLES
           binary_tab = lt_binary_content.
        TRY.
            lo_bcs = cl_bcs=>create_persistent( ).
*      ---------------------------------------------------------------------
*      -----------------&      Create Document     *------------------------
*      ---------------------------------------------------------------------
        DATA: LV_SUBJECT TYPE SO_OBJ_DES.

        LV_SUBJECT = LS_COMPOSER_PARAM-TDTITLE.
        lo_doc_bcs = cl_document_bcs=>create_document(
                        i_type    = 'RAW'
                        i_text    = lt_text[]
                        i_length  = '12'
                        i_subject = LV_SUBJECT ).   "Subject of the Email
*---------------------------------------------------------------------
*-----------------&   Add attachment to document     *----------------
*---------------------------------------------------------------------
        CALL METHOD lo_doc_bcs->add_attachment
          EXPORTING
            i_attachment_type    = 'PDF'
            i_attachment_size    = lv_bin_filesize
            i_attachment_subject = LV_SUBJECT
            i_att_content_hex    = lt_binary_content.

        CALL METHOD lo_bcs->set_document( lo_doc_bcs ).
        data: lv_string type ADR6-SMTP_ADDR.
        IF NAST-KSCHL = 'ZRDE'.
          lv_string = wa_TVARVC2-LOW.
                sender    = cl_cam_address_bcs=>create_internet_address(
                                                      lv_string ).
                lo_bcs->set_sender( sender ).
        ELSE.
          READ TABLE IT_TVARVC2 WITH KEY LOW = LS_BIL_INVOICE-HD_GEN-SOLD_TO_PARTY.
          IF SY-SUBRC IS NOT INITIAL AND ( T_VKORG NE '1000' AND T_VKORG NE '5000' ).
            lv_string = S_SENDER_EMAIL.
                  sender    = cl_cam_address_bcs=>create_internet_address(
                                                        lv_string ).
                  lo_bcs->set_sender( sender ).
          ENDIF.
        ENDIF.
       LOOP AT lt_adr6 into ls_adr6.
         lo_recep = cl_cam_address_bcs=>create_internet_address(
                                                        ls_adr6-smtp_addr ).
         if sy-tabix = 1.
          CALL METHOD lo_bcs->add_recipient
            EXPORTING
              i_recipient = lo_recep
              i_express   = 'X'.
         else.
            CALL METHOD lo_bcs->add_recipient
              EXPORTING
                i_recipient = lo_recep
                i_copy      = 'X'.

         endif.
       ENDLOOP.

        CALL METHOD lo_bcs->set_send_immediately
              EXPORTING
                i_send_immediately = ''.
*---------------------------------------------------------------------
*-----------------&   Send the email    *-----------------------------
*---------------------------------------------------------------------
    CALL METHOD lo_bcs->send(
      EXPORTING
        i_with_error_screen = 'X'
      RECEIVING
        result              = lv_sent_to_all ).

entry.title: BAPI_OUTB_DELIVERY_CREATE_SLS giving random result
entry.content:
Dear community,

we are using BAPI_OUTB_DELIVERY_CREATE_SLS in our custom FM to create deliveries. Custom FM is calling by RFC call. We have two scenarios when the standard FM generates different results:

1. When we send package from external system with Sales Order number and only 1 line item (in Sales Order in SAP we have 5 line items) there is created delivery for all 5 items. Then when we delete this delivery and send the package with 1 line item again for the same Sales Order there is created delivery with only 1 line item as expected. Same result when we set a break-point and checking in debug mode the variables - everything is fine.

2. Similar situation with order consolidation: we send package from external system with 2 Sales Orders: for the first time system creates only 1 delivery for 1 of the orders, when we delete  delivery and send same package again - it creates one consolidated delivery for both orders. And again with external break-point everything is working as expected from the first attempt.

We placed wait parameter for 1 second before FM but no success. Also we checked some old enhancements in standard FM for some logic, but did not find any impact. Checked external system, the packages of the data sent to SAP with RFC are always the same.

If somebody faced with such issue in the past, could you please share your experience and thoughts.

Thank you!

entry.title: Re: How to get the cancellation date for an invoice in VBRK?
entry.content:
I couldn’t find how to delete my own posts, but here’s what I’ve discovered:

The table VBRK has a column called SFAKN, which contains the number of the original canceled document. Additionally, in our specific implementation of SAP, the column VBRK-VBTYP holds the value ‘N’ for cancellation documents. Therefore, I used the following SQL statement:

 

 

  SELECT SINGLE fkdat FROM vbrk
    WHERE sfakn = @p_vbeln
      AND vbtyp = 'N'
    INTO _date.

 

 

Hope this helps.

entry.title: Communication error when sending with HTTP, Idoc to HTTP destination
entry.content:
Hi,

I am trying to send idoc to HTTP destination using background job. Idoc gets created but sending fails.

Communication error when sending with HTTP

The error code and the error message are: 411 /Connect to XXXXXX:443 failed: NIECONN_REFUSED(-10).

Same works fine when done manually, but not in job. Connection test is ok in SM59.

Cannot find anythig helpfull with error code 411...

Any ideas what might be the problem when sending in background?

Regards,

Pekka

entry.content:
Delivery is created and when doing PGI, i got runtime error - description of exception. can someone please help me to resolve this issue to do the PGI.
Error Screenshot:

entry.title: Screen Enhancement for IW48 Transaction.
entry.content:
Hi Team,

Greetings of the day!

Need to do screen enhancement for adding a custom field in input and output of IW48 transaction.

Please let me know the procedure for the same.

Thanks,

Sai Bhargav.

entry.title: Unable to fetch KBETR field in price condition using formula routine
entry.content:
We have (zppt price per )tonne which is header condition type also we have ZB00 is base price item condition, we will enter manually zppt price at header and we have to calculate base price condition amount in KBETR ,we have created 918 condition value formula routine , we unable fetch zb00 condition rate in KBETR field, we are getting calculated XKWERT field i.e condition value, unable fetch KBETR, please suggest solution.

data : lt_pack TYPE TABLE OF zpack, wa_pack TYPE zpack.

data : lt_marm TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF marm, wa_marm type marm.

data : lt_marm1 TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF marm, wa_marm1 type marm.

data : lt_prcd TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF prcd_elements, wa_prcd type prcd_elements.

*DATA : ZB001 TYPE p DECIMALS 3.

DATA : ZB001 TYPE decfloat34.

DATA : ZB002 TYPE KWERT.

DATA : ZB003 TYPE KWERT.

data : lv_conversion TYPE f.

SELECT * FROM zpack INTO TABLE lt_pack WHERE matnr = komp-matnr and WERKS = komp-werks and meins = komp-meins.

SORT lt_pack DESCENDING by edate. SELECT * FROM marm INTO TABLE lt_marm where matnr = komp-matnr and meinh = 'TO'.

SELECT * from prcd_elements into table lt_prcd where knumv = komk-knumv and kschl = 'ZPPT'.

READ TABLE lt_marm into wa_marm INDEX 1. READ TABLE lt_pack into wa_pack INDEX 1. READ TABLE lt_prcd into wa_prcd with key kschl = 'ZPPT' kposn = komp-kposn.

ZB001 = ( wa_marm-umren / wa_marm-umrez ) .

IF KOMV-KSCHL = 'ZPPT'.

ZB002 = ZB001 * KOMV-KBETR .

ZB003 = ZB002 + wa_pack-rate.

xkwert = ZB003 * KOMP-MGAME / 1000 . ELSEIF

KOMV-KSCHL = 'ZB00'.

ZB002 = KOMV-kbetr.

xkwert = ZB002 * KOMP-MGAME / 1000 . ENDIF.

*ZB003 = ZB002 + wa_pack-rate.

xkwert = ZB003 KOMP-MGAME / 1000     above code is written in condition value formula routine

entry.title: XSLT transformation error
entry.content:
Hi Expert,

I am using XSLT_TOOL to transform xml to ABAP internal table. However, I got error in below transformation. Error message "System expected the end of the element 'subject'" occurs. Below screen capture is the transformation and the source. Please help.

Thanks & Best Regards,

Catherine

entry.title: CJI3 - SUBMIT RKPEP003 doesn't work with parameter
entry.content:
Dear experts,

I need to call Tcode CJI3 from an ABAP report.

I thought of using only parameter ID's and then calling transaction but there's a selection field in CJI3 that doesn't have a parameter ID (posting date), therefore I'm trying to set its values and use the submit program command. For some reason, it doesn't work..

Can anyone advise accordingly?..

My code:

      set PARAMETER ID 'CAC' FIELD gv_ctrar.
      set PARAMETER ID 'PDB' FIELD gv_prfdb.
      set PARAMETER ID 'KAT' FIELD gv_KSTAR.

      SET PARAMETER ID 'PRO' FIELD gs_alv-PSPID.

      SUBMIT RKPEP003 WITH R_BUDAT-low = ''
                                      WITH R_BUDAT-high = so_bldat-low AND RETURN.

entry.title: SPROXY End to End Testing - Shop -> PI 7.5 ->S4HANA Scenario
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I have a question regarding a project I’m currently working on. Let me provide some background details for better context.

Background

We have a scenario that consists of four main steps:

  1. A Webshop sends an order to the Process Integration (PI) system.
  2. The PI system receives the message via SOAP, validates its structure, and forwards it to the backend system via HTTP. A valid and working HTTP destination is already configured for this.
  3. In the backend system, using SPROXY, we handle the namespace of the ESR (Enterprise Service Repository) and can view all design objects. A service provider processes the message, forwards it to an ABAP class, which extracts the relevant data, fills a BAPI, and finally creates a sales document in the SAP backend using the payload data.
  4. This scenario has been running smoothly, and the existing functionality is working perfectly.

New Requirement

The requirements have now changed. The webshop will send two new optional fields if they are available. To address this, we made the following changes:

  • The PI structure was updated to handle these two fields (this part is already completed and working).
  • In the backend, the ABAP class logic was updated to:
    • Map these new fields if provided.
    • Pass the new data into a newly declared table. This table will handle the additional fields in parallel with the existing configuration.

With this update, the new fields will be processed as follows:

  • If the fields are present in the payload, they are mapped to the new table and passed along with the original tables to the BAPI.
  • If the fields are not provided, the process will continue as before, without impacting the existing functionality.

After implementing these changes, the scenario appears to function correctly. Messages sent from the PI Test Tool are successfully delivered to the backend.

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Current Challenge

When testing through the PI Test Tool, I see that the messages are being delivered to the backend. However, I am unable to verify if the sales document is being created correctly or if the new fields are included when provided.

Request

Can you guide me on how to perform an end-to-end test to ensure the functionality works as expected? Specifically:

  • Which SAP transactions can I use to check if the sales document has been created successfully and verify the inclusion of the new fields? Which data can I use for the search process?
  • If debugging is needed, how can I:
    • Import the payload into the ABAP code for testing?
    • Check if the message sent from the PI Test Tool is properly processed in the backend?

Any help in verifying this scenario end-to-end would be greatly appreciated. Thank you in advance for your support!

entry.title: CIR MD81 configurations
entry.content:
Dear Gurus,

I am working on CIRs. My questions are of 2 parts. 

1. is there any BAPI that is particularly used for MD81/MD82 (create and update of CIRs)?

2. How to add configurations to CIR during create?

 

I have been working on this topic for past couple of weeks and havent been able to get ahead and would need your expert guidance.

Further on configuration issue: 

2. a) I am using BAPI SD_SALESDOCUMENT_CREATE to create CIR and this is allowing me to create CIR. However, it doesn't  create configuration (VBAP_CUOBJ remains blank even after providing parameters sales_cfgs_ref , sales_cfgs_inst, sales_cfgs_value ,  sales_cfgs_vk  and 
    sales_cfgs_refinst) . ( BAPI_TRANSACTION_COMMIT  is called after this!)

2. b) Then I tried calling FM CE_C_PROCESSING in addition to 2.a), this throws error as instance is not populated from VBAP-CUOBJ

2. c) Thirdly i tried calling FM V45CU_CONFIGURATION  in addition to point 2.a) . I get "Internal error in communication between configuration and sales doc.GET_CONFIG_MODE" because of VBAP-CUOBJ being blank and this is supposed to be the importing parameter through INSTANCE 

 

Basically below pseudocode is the sequence of FMs i ave tried to use to create CIR with configs and has failed. 

BAPI_CFG_CREATE

BAPI_CFG_READ

CUX1_CHARACTS_READ

SD_SALESDOCUMENT_CREATE

BAPI_TRANSACTION_COMMIT

CE_C_PROCESSING.

Any inputs would be helpful. please let me know if any clarifications are needed

entry.title: CREATE button is not appearing after deployed Fiori Application using RAP ODATA with UI Annotation
entry.content:
Used Fiori Element template List Report Object Page

CREATE button is not appearing after deployed List Report Object Fiori Elements Application using RAP ODATA with UI Annotation

1)When I run the RAP Application locally  I am able to see the CREATE button for the Resource section and Hours Section in the Object Page.

2)When I deploy the application in SAP -on premise system 2023 and clicked on the below tile

3)Now the List Report open and clicked on particular record and  enter into the Object page and not able to see the CREATE button for the Resource and Hours section

Please find the attachments in detail

entry.title: BAPI_ALM_ORDER_MAINTAIN
entry.content:
Hi SAP Gurus,

I need to change the status from TECO to CLSD for service orders. I am trying to use the, "BAPI_ALM_ORDER_MAINTAIN". I am not sure if the method CLOSE or CLOSED is available to close the order directly. If it is there, kindly give me an example to close the order using BAPI_ALM_ORDER_MAINTAIN", or kindly suggest me other ways or possibilities.

entry.title: How to post an Accounting Document with multiple currency codes
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I've a requirement to post an Accounting Document via BAPI_ACC_DOCUMENT_POST with multiple currency codes line items.

Ex: Below line items should be posted as a single document.

Transaction CurrencyAmount in TCLocal CurrencyAmount in LC
USD17.25KRW25000
AED63.36KRW25000
SGD46.87-KRW50000-

But I'm getting error that USD 17.25 is not balanced, however the local currency amount is balanced.

Expecting a suitable solution to achieve the same.

Regards,

Raja

entry.title: Program to delete already released transports
entry.content:
Hello Guys ,

I would like to clean up the transports that are not transported to production but existing in development and quality systems .

Please let me know if there is any standard SAP program to delete Transports which are already released and not transported to production .

Regards,

Kamalakar.

entry.title: How do I read text from BP Role Customer from S/4HANA Public Cloud?
entry.content:
Hi Gurus,

I must read the content from BP Role Customer and get text from Shipping Instructions for a given custom CDS view column that I´m creating now but when I try to use a wrapper class using the function module READ_TEXT it says it´s not permitted:

Is there any workaround for it please?

Thanks in advance,
Mauricio Predolim
